ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BenedictKing/ccx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BenedictKing/ccx
Language: go
Claude / Codex / Gemini API Proxy - CCX

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo
Language: go
Sample cloud-first application with 10 microservices showcasing Kubernetes, Istio, and gRPC.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Project-HAMi/HAMi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Project-HAMi/HAMi
Language: go
Heterogeneous GPU Sharing on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apernet/hysteria
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apernet/hysteria
Language: go
Hysteria is a powerful, lightning fast and censorship resistant proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebase/bytebase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebase/bytebase
Language: go
World's most advanced database DevSecOps solution for Developer, Security, DBA and Platform Engineering teams. The GitHub/GitLab for database DevSecOps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudwego/eino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudwego/eino
Language: go
The ultimate LLM/AI application development framework in Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: etcd-io/etcd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd
Language: go
Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fatedier/frp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fatedier/frp
Language: go
A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/gh-aw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/gh-aw
Language: go
GitHub Agentic Workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/nomad
Language: go
Nomad is an easy-to-use, flexible, and performant workload orchestrator that can deploy a mix of microservice, batch, containerized, and non-containerized applications. Nomad is easy to operate and scale and has native Consul and Vault integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
Language: go
A tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mark3labs/mcp-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go
Language: go
A Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling seamless integration between LLM applications and external data sources and tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nats-io/nats-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server
Language: go
High-Performance server for NATS.io, the cloud and edge native messaging system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector

A declarative, simple, fast, and fun package for building command line tools in Go
